channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How drone activity could affect US holiday travel plans
item.description: Recent drone sightings around the country have raised concerns over whether drone activity could affect holiday travel
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, The Hill

item.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene open to Musk for Speaker
item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) said Thursday she would be open to supporting Elon Musk for House Speaker, an idea proposed by other Republicans as Congress faces a government shutdown Friday night. Musk railed against the continuing resolution (CR) negotiated by Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Massive data breach at federal credit union exposes 240,000 members
item.description: A credit union with over 240,000 members recently revealed it was targeted by cybercriminals, resulting in a data breach that was part of a two-month attack by hackers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Hapn Website Exposes Sensitive User Information
item.description: A security researcher found Hapn website spilling sensitive information, including people's names and business affiliation, but the company is remaining quiet for now.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Climate tech opportunities for IT pros
item.description: In what can only be labeled as a very encouraging trend, jobs and projects abound for tech professionals wanting to use their skills and expertise to try and make our planet and climate well again.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How 1 man got scammed in seconds using Google
item.description: Scammers have become skilled at creating convincing fake websites that can easily fool unsuspecting users. The CyberGuy offers tips to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sony announces new 'Amethyst' collaboration with AMD to develop 'machine learning' technology in games
item.description: PlayStation console architect Mark Cerny has announced a new collaboration between Sony and AMD codenamed 'Amethyst'.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The US egg industry kills 350 million chicks a year. New technology offers an alternative
item.description: Every year the U.S. egg industry kills about 350 million male chicks because they will never lay eggs and so have little monetary value.
item.dc:creator: Scott Mcfetridge, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Salesforce’s Agentforce 2.0 update aims to make AI agents smarter
item.description: Salesforce has updated its agentic AI platform, Agentforce, to help enterprises build and deploy better agents, faster, across systems and workflows. Agentforce 2.0 is the second release of the agentic AI platform in two months.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: McConnell urges Supreme Court to reject TikTok's bid to delay ban
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) filed an amicus brief with the Supreme Court on Wednesday, urging it to reject TikTok’s request to delay a law that could ban the app next month.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: GitHub launches free tier of Copilot AI coding assistant
item.description: GitHub has launched GitHub Copilot Free, providing access to a free tier of the AI-based pair programmer via Microsoft’s Visual Studio Code editor. Announced December 18, Copilot Free gives developers access to 2,000 code completions and 50 chat messages monthly.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2
item.description: Army PEO C3N is obtaining industry feedback as part of its market research as it develops solicitations for the next generation command and control effort. The post Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Slack adds Agentforce ‘hub’ for AI agents
item.description: Slack is adding a new way to access AI agents created on parent company Salesforce’s Agentforce platform, with a library of options available in the collaboration app. Agentforce, which launched in October, is a tool to build AI agents that answer questions and automate tasks for users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: CompTIA launches expert-level cybersecurity certification
item.description: CompTIA this week made available its CompTIA SecurityX certification program, which is an updated version of the CompTIA Advanced Security Practitioner (CASP+) cert and part of CompTIA’s Xpert Series of certifications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: On Arm PC return rates and CEO posturing
item.description: With her claim that retailers are seeing high returns of Arm PCs, Intel interim CEO Michelle Johnston Holthaus appears to be trying to scare buyers off the rival processor architecture. But enterprise buyers who look before they leap have little to fear.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Youtube has a new tool to detect AI-faked celebrities
item.description: Fake AI clips of celebrities are becoming increasingly common, something that affects, among other things, artists and actors who have their voices and looks cloned without their permission.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 12 Android tips you shouldn’t miss from 2024
item.description: Ah, the holidays. No matter what manner of winter celebration you prefer (I’m a Festivus man myself), late December is a fine time for kickin’ back and collecting your thoughts for the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Kazakhstan's Revolutionary "Carpet CCTV" Project: A Model for Smarter, Safer Cities
item.description: Kazakhstan's Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way with its groundbreaking 'Carpet CCTV' project, combining surveillance networks, advanced analytics, and AI to revolutionize public safety.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Smart cities in action: Kazakhstan’s Carpet CCTV project sets a new standard
item.description: In a world where technology increasingly shapes how cities manage safety and security, Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way with its groundbreaking “Carpet CCTV” project.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Analyze text using natural language with Claude for Google Sheets
item.description: You can do a lot more with generative AI (genAI) in Google Sheets than get help writing spreadsheet formulas.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: CISA cyber leader says agencies have addressed SolarWinds gaps
item.description: CISA has worked with agencies in recent years to expand data captured by the CDM program, improve log retention, and boost network threat hunting operations. The post CISA cyber leader says agencies have addressed SolarWinds gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network
